summary: Iteration 236 — S4 v2 POS DOCX Generator Rewrite Testing Complete. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including mode selector (bozza_interna, bozza_revisione, finale_stampabile), POS generation card, and download button.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token BccyJvnOyrPXRRYy4GfxR5osuF51RWcYWWnUUoHx434, cantiere_id cant_3894750ebe93 (6 fasi, 20 rischi, 10 DPI).
context_for_next_testing_agent: S4 v2 POS DOCX Generator fully working. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/genera-pos?mode=bozza_revisione generates DOCX with 29+ sections, 20+ tables, ~48KB. (2) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/genera-pos?mode=bozza_interna shows [DA COMPLETARE] placeholders. (3) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/genera-pos?mode=finale_stampabile blocks if gate blockers exist. (4) Cover page has P.O.S. title (48pt), PIANO OPERATIVO DI SICUREZZA subtitle, D.Lgs. 81/2008 reference, revision table. (5) All 29 section headings have yellow highlight. (6) Section 29 (Schede rischio per fase) generates risk tables per phase with P/D/Classe and DPI tables. (7) Dichiarazione section has DICHIARA centered, signature table with 3 roles. (8) DPI section has 7 descriptive text blocks AND dynamic table from risk analysis. (9) X-POS-Mode header returned in response. (10) Frontend has mode selector with 3 options (bozza_interna, bozza_revisione, finale_stampabile). (11) Frontend download works with mode parameter.
